name: Puree of Fava Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Za'atar - Use thyme, oregano or marjoram
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and peel the soaked fava beans.
2. Cover with fresh water and cook gently with the garlic and cumin seeds until the beans are tender.
3. Drain the cooked beans.
4. Puree the beans in a food processor.
5. Stir in enough olive oil and a little water to achieve a soupy consistency. Season with salt and beat well.
6. Heat just before serving with a little more olive oil and a sprinkling of za'atar.
7. Serve with Arab bread and a bowl of mixed spices (ground cumin, cayenne, and salt).
